mapper.sql: id, trace_id, user_id, user_email_snapshot, token_id, token_prefix_snapshot, backend_id, backend_key, server_name_snapshot, tool_name, tool_description_snapshot, transport_type, inbound_session_id, outbound_session_id, arguments_json, result_json, stream_logs_json, success, error_code, error_message, cost_ms, create_time

LEFT JOIN mcp_backend bk ON bk.backend_id = l.backend_key LEFT JOIN mcp_backend b ON b.id = l.backend_id LEFT JOIN mcp_user u ON u.id = l.user_id LEFT JOIN mcp_session s ON s.session_id = l.inbound_session_id LEFT JOIN mcp_api_token t ON t.id = COALESCE(l.token_id, s.token_id) LEFT JOIN mcp_backend legacy_b ON l.backend_key IS NULL AND l.backend_id < 0 AND ( legacy_b.backend_id = CONCAT('db_', CAST(-l.backend_id AS CHAR)) OR l.backend_id = -(CRC32(legacy_b.backend_id) + 1000000) )
mapper.select:
SELECT l.id, l.trace_id AS traceId, l.user_id AS userId, COALESCE(l.user_email_snapshot, u.email) AS userEmail, COALESCE(l.token_prefix_snapshot, t.token_prefix) AS tokenPrefix, l.backend_id AS backendId, l.backend_key AS backendKey, COALESCE(l.server_name_snapshot, bk.server_name, b.server_name, legacy_b.server_name) AS serverName, l.tool_name AS toolName, l.tool_description_snapshot AS toolDescription, l.transport_type AS transportType, l.inbound_session_id AS inboundSessionId, l.outbound_session_id AS outboundSessionId, l.arguments_json AS argumentsJson, l.result_json AS resultJson, l.stream_logs_json AS streamLogsJson, NULL AS status, l.success, l.error_code AS errorCode, l.error_message AS errorMessage, l.cost_ms AS costMs, l.create_time AS invokedAt, l.client_ip AS clientIp, l.user_agent AS userAgent FROM mcp_call_log l
ORDER BY l.create_time DESC, l.id DESC LIMIT #{query.offset}, #{query.size}

SELECT l.id, l.trace_id AS traceId, l.user_id AS userId, COALESCE(l.user_email_snapshot, u.email) AS userEmail, COALESCE(l.token_prefix_snapshot, t.token_prefix) AS tokenPrefix, l.backend_id AS backendId, l.backend_key AS backendKey, COALESCE(l.server_name_snapshot, bk.server_name, b.server_name, legacy_b.server_name) AS serverName, l.tool_name AS toolName, l.tool_description_snapshot AS toolDescription, l.transport_type AS transportType, l.inbound_session_id AS inboundSessionId, l.outbound_session_id AS outboundSessionId, l.arguments_json AS argumentsJson, l.result_json AS resultJson, l.stream_logs_json AS streamLogsJson, NULL AS status, l.success, l.error_code AS errorCode, l.error_message AS errorMessage, l.cost_ms AS costMs, l.create_time AS invokedAt, l.client_ip AS clientIp, l.user_agent AS userAgent FROM mcp_call_log l
WHERE l.id = #{id} AND l.user_id = #{userId}

SELECT b.id AS backendId, b.backend_id AS backendPublicId, b.server_name AS backendName, b.transport_type AS transportType, b.status AS connectionStatus, b.enabled AS enabled, b.last_sync_at AS lastSyncAt, COALESCE(t.tool_count, 0) AS toolCount, COUNT(l.id) AS invokeCount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN l.success = 0 OR l.cost_ms >= 1800000 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS errorCount, COALESCE(AVG(l.cost_ms), 0) AS avgCostMs, COALESCE(MAX(l.cost_ms), 0) AS p99CostMs FROM mcp_backend b LEFT JOIN mcp_call_log l ON l.backend_id = b.id AND l.create_time BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} AND l.user_id = #{userId} LEFT JOIN ( SELECT backend_id, COUNT(*) AS tool_count FROM mcp_backend_tool GROUP BY backend_id ) t ON t.backend_id = b.id WHERE 1=1 GROUP BY b.id, b.backend_id, b.server_name, b.transport_type, b.status, b.enabled, b.last_sync_at, t.tool_count ORDER BY invokeCount DESC

SELECT l.transport_type AS transportType, TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, #{startTime}, l.create_time) AS slotIndex, DATE_FORMAT( DATE_ADD(#{startTime}, INTERVAL TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, #{startTime}, l.create_time) HOUR), '%H:%i' ) AS slotLabel, AVG(l.cost_ms) AS avgCostMs FROM mcp_call_log l WHERE l.user_id = #{userId} AND l.create_time >= #{startTime} AND l.create_time < #{endTime} GROUP BY l.transport_type, slotIndex, slotLabel ORDER BY l.transport_type, slotIndex
